## Swarm Task: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

**Task ID:** s1
**Title:** Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor

Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to identify key features and capabilities of the ClaudeCode product. Document your findings including unique features, functionality gaps compared to our product, and potential improvements we could implement. Save analysis to target/temp/swarmout/claudecode_analysis.md

You are part of a swarm team. Complete this specific task.

IMPORTANT: Your VERY FIRST action must be a tool call. Call `team_read_messages` with team_name set to the team name from your context. Do NOT respond with text first — call the tool immediately.

After reading messages, do the work described above using tool calls (glob, read, bash, etc.). When done, call `team_task_complete` to mark task "s1" as completed.
Focus only on your assigned task — other teammates are handling other parts.

## Swarm Task: Generate Detailed Implementation Plan

**Task ID:** s6
**Title:** Generate Detailed Implementation Plan

Structure it as: Milestone 1 (MVP features), Milestone 2 (Enhanced functionality), Milestone 3 (Advanced features). For each milestone, list specific development tasks, estimated effort, and dependencies. Save as target/temp/swarmout/implementation_plan.md
